sourceSummary.oneLine: Product drawing for MSV-100010 BLUE_1417_GF_EMI_SHEET with dimensions, material layers, and production notes.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Use as a manufacturing and inspection drawing for the specified EMI sheet part, including material stack, critical dimensions, burr limit, cleanliness, and release paper requirements.
keyPoints: Drawing identifies DWG/part number MSV-100010 and name BLUE_1417_GF_EMI_SHEET.
Drawing is marked PRODUCT DRAWING and Confidential, issued by H&abyz Co.,Ltd. R&D Center.
Material notes identify a 100㎛ layer and a 120㎛ layer, with DSN-SW110A and SSN-010L called out in section view.
Notes require inspection data for all dimensions to be submitted to H&ABYZ and specify burrs shall not exceed 0.05mm.

evidence.claim: The document is a product drawing for BLUE_1417_GF_EMI_SHEET.
The drawing number and part number are MSV-100010.
evidence.evidenceText: DWG NO. ... MSV-100010 ... PART NO. ... MSV-100010

evidence.claim: The product/model reference BF1417MCW appears on the drawing.
Critical to Function dimensions are identified for production.
evidence.evidenceText: ①② CTF ( CRITICAL TO FUNCTION) DIMENSIONS FOR PRODUCTION.

evidence.claim: Inspection data for all dimensions should be submitted to H&ABYZ.
evidence.evidenceText: INSPECTION DATA FOR ALL DIMENSIONS SHOULD BE SUBMITTED TO H&ABYZ

evidence.claim: The critical dimensions shown are 437.5±0.3 and 359.4±0.3.
The part must be free of dirt and oil.
evidence.evidenceText: PART TO BE FREE OF DIRT AND OIL .

evidence.claim: Release paper remains on the adhesive side and anti-static release paper is applied.
evidence.evidenceText: RELEASE PAPER REMAINED ON ADHESIVE SIDE. ANTI STATIC RELEASE PAPER APPLIED

evidence.claim: Section view calls out conductive sheet DSN-SW110A at 120㎛ and non-conductive sheet SSN-010L at 100㎛.

reviewFlags.reason: No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is identified in the source text; authoritySignal is only 'general'.
No external standards are cited in the source text.
Material note text has OCR ambiguity: 'DSN-SWIIOA'/'DSN-SW110A' and 'SSN-0I0L'/'SSN-010L' appear with potentially confused I/1/0 characters.
Document is a product drawing rather than an RA/regulatory approval document.
